title: Iron Legs
description: Intensive leg work with 1.5 squats, Bulgarian split squats and dynamic plank

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Side shuffles
exercises.instructions: Quick lateral shuffles, 3-4 steps each side

exercises.name: Deep squat hold
exercises.instructions: Hold a deep squat, back straight, elbows against the knees

exercises.name: Hip 90/90
exercises.instructions: Seated, legs at 90 degrees, twist side to side

exercises.name: 1.5 squats
exercises.instructions: Lower, come up halfway, lower again, come up fully

exercises.name: Bulgarian split squats
exercises.instructions: Back foot on a chair, lower the knee

exercises.name: Single-leg deadlift
exercises.instructions: Lean the torso forward, one leg lifts behind, keep balance

exercises.name: Table reverse hyper
exercises.instructions: Belly on the edge, lift legs behind you

exercises.name: Scissors
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, legs extended, cross alternating over/under

exercises.name: Plank to downward dog
exercises.instructions: Alternate between high plank and downward dog

exercises.name: Forearm plank
exercises.instructions: On forearms, body perfectly aligned, brace the abs

exercises.name: Psoas stretch
exercises.instructions: Low lunge, drive the hip forward

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Leg extended forward, lean torso forward

exercises.name: World's greatest stretch
exercises.instructions: Lunge + torso rotation + arm to the sky

exercises.name: Child's pose
exercises.instructions: Kneeling, arms extended forward, forehead on the floor, breathe deeply
